items.deck: If you haven't updated your Apple device in a while, now may be the time to do it.

items.title: General Says U.S. Boat Strikes Are Not Answer to Country’s Drug Problem
items.deck: Gen. Francis L. Donovan, the head of the military’s Southern Command, said he was working with regional allies on the issue.

items.title: A Gift From Trump to the Supreme Court
items.deck: In a caustic critique of the court issued on social media late Sunday night, the president inadvertently buttressed its independence.

items.title: Travis Turner's high school makes move to distance themselves further from fugitive coach wanted on child porn charges
items.deck: Fugitive Turner, a 46-year-old married father-of-three, went on the run days before it emerged police wanted him for 10 alleged child sex offenses back in November.

items.title: Is NATO a Partnership or Just a Series of Deals?
items.deck: Dan’s latest Daily Mail column looks at the fraying of NATO in the heat of the Iran War.

items.title: Extended Mideast Conflict Would Slow Trade and Growth, W.T.O. Warns
items.deck: The trade organization said that a slowdown in trade in 2026 could become even more extreme if the war in the Middle East persists.

items.title: Watch: Missile lands next to presenter during live report from Lebanon
items.deck: In footage from Russian state broadcaster RT, correspondent Steve Sweeney is seen diving off screen as a missile hits.

items.title: Smart sanctions can save Trump's 'peace through strength' plan
items.deck: The Trump administration has eased oil-related sanctions on some countries in response to the sharp increase in oil prices, but this decision is dangerous for U.

items.title: BABA Shares Crash Most In Six Months As Net Income Plunge Overshadows AI Progress
items.deck: BABA Shares Crash Most In Six Months As Net Income Plunge Overshadows AI Progress Alibaba ADRs suffered their sharpest drop in six months during the US cash session after quarterly results revealed a massive tumble in net income and sluggish top-line growth, overshadowing yet another quarter of triple-digit expansion across its cloud and AI businesses.

items.title: Father of a Palestinian woman killed with three others during a missile attack expresses shock.
items.deck: The victims are the first Palestinians in the Israeli-occupied West Bank to be killed as a result of the Middle East war.

items.title: 47-year-old Idaho mayor dies after collapsing at town hall event
items.deck: Rick Hogaboam, the 47-year-old mayor of Nampa, Idaho, died after collapsing as he was attending a town hall on Wednesday night.
